Defendants Notice Of Motion And Omnibus Motion For An Order Appointing Referee To Ascertain The Interests Of Lienholders And Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Rottinghaus, Esq. & Jacob A. Moss, Esq., of Berding & Weil LLP, (925-838-2090), for Sharon Lee Seto, Gordon Lee, Patty Lum and Stephen Lee, Defendants and moving parties.
Robert R. Riggs, Esq. of Katzoff & Riggs LLP, (510-588-5173), for ALZ Lee, LLC, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Cathy Meyer, SCR#11596, (877-451-1580).

On the record, clarifications on the tentative ruling tendered are stated in open court as reported in the reporter's notes. Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs GORDON LEE, SHACUAN SHARON SETO SUED HEREIN AS SHACUAN, LEE and PATRICIA W., F/K/A PATRICIA LUM MOTION's Motion And Omnibus Motion For An Order Appointing A Referee To Ascertain The Interests Of Lienholders And Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part.

Motion for appointment of referee is GRANTED as follows:
1. Parties are to meet and confer regarding a referee and submit a joint proposed order to the Court no later than January 9, 2015. The order shall also specify the deadline for referee's report under CCP 872.630 and for any motions challenging such report; OR
2. If parties cannot agree on a referee, each party (parties shall meet and confer if submissions will be per side or per party) shall submit a list of 3 proposed referees, ready and willing to serve no later than January 9, 2015. Each party may object to one proposed referee no later than January 16, 2015. Defendant shall prepare an order appointing a referee leaving the name of the referee blank. The order shall also specify the deadline for referee's report under CCP 872.630 and for any motions challenging such report.

Motion for entry of interlocutory judgment is DENIED without prejudice to be brought after the referee's report is finalized.

Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Cathy Meyer, SCR#11596, (877-451-1580).
